additionalFunding.name: SMU Academic Excellence Award
additionalFunding.criteria: Top matric results; APS 44+; exceptional performance in life sciences and maths

additionalFunding.name: SMU Health Sciences Bursary
additionalFunding.criteria: Students in health-critical disciplines; South African citizens

additionalFunding.name: SMU Rural Service Commitment Bursary
additionalFunding.criteria: Students who commit to rural/underserved community service post-graduation
